seedPhrase.title: Use a Seed Phrase to Import Your Passport
seedPhrase.description: Enter your <0>64-character</0> or <2>word phrase seed</2> below to regain access to an existing {{brand}} passport.
seedPhrase.advancedOption: This is an advanced option for users who already saved their seed during passport creation. If you don't have a seed, you will need to go back and <0>create a new passport</0> instead.
seedPhrase.placeholder: Paste your seed phrase or key here...

important.heading: Important!
important.rule1: Keep your seed safe and offline.
important.rule3: If someone else has your seed, they can control your passport.

error.invalidChars: Seed must only contain numbers and letters (a–f).
error.tooShort: Seed phrase needs to be 64 characters long.

welcome.heading: Welcome to {{brand}}

underage.heading: Get an Adult
underage.description: You'll need a parent or guardian to add you to a family account before you can join.

schoolCode.description: To join without a parent account, please enter the special code provided by your school.

us.heading: Consent Notice

export.title: Export Seed Phrase
export.masterKeyWarning: This is your {{brand}}'s master key. Anyone with access to this phrase can control your {{brand}} and your identity. - Do NOT share it. - Do NOT store it online or take screenshots. - Write it down and store it offline. - If you lose this, you may permanently lose access. <0>Are you sure you want to proceed?</0>
